extortion.description: Carlson Building Maintenance specializes in commercial cleaning services throughout the Midwest, offering a variety of solutions including general cleaning, hard floor care, carpet cleaning, and specialty services. They serve diverse industries such as retail,grocery, schools, and warehouses, tailoring their cleaning programs to meet the specific needs of each facility. We are ready to upload more than 20GB of there data. There are lots of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audit, payment details,financial reports, invoices), employees and customers information (passports, driver's licenses, emails, phones), confidential information and other documents with personal information.
